How does this device differ from the CAVR map? Yeah, well, CaverMap is looking at an end-organ response. CaverMap is sticking a probe around the penis, around the urethra, stimulating these nerves and waiting to actually induce vasodilation and an erection. This is not doing that. This is not CaverMap. This is not looking for an erectile response. This is looking at a compound motor action potential. So when you stimulate a nerve, with a certain signal. It sends that signal down the nerve.

It releases acetylcholine into the muscle, and this will record the acetylcholine response, which is going to be this compound motor action potential.
